title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 7
instructions: For each question, choose the correct picture. You will hear each audio twice.

items.context: You hear man and woman talking about the family picnic.
items.audio_script: Man: Hi, Tom. I’m checking the plan for the family picnic. I thought we were going to go to the beach, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message. || Woman: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. [1]Mum says we’re having it in the forest because it’s less windy[/1]. || Man: Good thing I asked. I nearly packed beach towels. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast. || Woman: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Hi, Tom. I’m checking the plan for the family picnic. I thought we were going to go to the beach, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. Mum says we’re having it in the forest because it’s less windy.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Good thing I asked. I nearly packed beach towels. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.

items.question: Where will the picnic be?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, sandy beach with umbrella, no text, flat educational drawing, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, forest picnic table, no text, flat educational drawing, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, city park bench, no text, flat educational drawing, minimal details, clean white background.

items.explanation: The speaker says: “Mum says we’re having it in the forest because it’s less windy.” This matches option B.

items.context: You hear customer and assistant talking about the school show.
items.audio_script: Customer: Hi, Lucy. I’m checking the plan for the school show. I thought we were going to arrive at five, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message. || Assistant: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. [1]The show starts at half past five, but performers come earlier[/1]. || Customer: Good thing I asked. I nearly sat in the hall too long. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast. || Assistant: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.

dialogue.speaker: customer
dialogue.text: Hi, Lucy. I’m checking the plan for the school show. I thought we were going to arrive at five, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message.

dialogue.speaker: assistant
dialogue.text: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. The show starts at half past five, but performers come earlier.

dialogue.speaker: customer
dialogue.text: Good thing I asked. I nearly sat in the hall too long. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast.

dialogue.speaker: assistant
dialogue.text: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.
